_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the AusMT positional column contract. Edit ONLY here, then run `python contract/generate.py` to regenerate engine/extract/_contract.py and portal/src/contract.js. catalogue.json/sci.json/tf.json are bare arrays decoded BY POSITION across the engine and the portal, so column ORDER is a published interface — APPEND, never reorder (a same-width reorder silently corrupts every consumer). Authoritative human doc: docs/docs/developer/data-files.md.
